_schema.description: Aspects (Drishti) - how planets cast influence on other houses/planets. Vedic uses full aspects only (not partial like Western).
_schema.usage: When a planet aspects a house/planet, it adds its energy to that location.

aspect_rules.all_planets: Every planet aspects the 7th house from itself (full aspect)
aspect_rules.mars_special: Mars also aspects 4th and 8th houses from itself
aspect_rules.jupiter_special: Jupiter also aspects 5th and 9th houses from itself
aspect_rules.saturn_special: Saturn also aspects 3rd and 10th houses from itself
aspect_rules.rahu_ketu_special: Some traditions: Rahu and Ketu aspect 5th, 7th, 9th from themselves

themes: adds ego, authority, visibility, father energy
sun_aspecting.on_planet: Empowers but may overshadow that planet; ego-driven actions
sun_aspecting.on_house: Brings authority, public attention, government themes to that life area

themes: adds emotion, public, fluctuation, mother energy
moon_aspecting.on_planet: Softens and emotionalizes that planet's expression
moon_aspecting.on_house: Brings emotional themes, public connection, fluctuation

mars_aspecting.on_planet: Energizes but can damage; brings urgency and conflict
mars_aspecting.on_house: Brings disputes, action, courage, accidents to that area
mars_aspecting.special_note: Mars's special 4th and 8th aspects are powerful - 4th = home conflicts, 8th = sudden events

mercury_aspecting.on_house: Brings analytical thinking, communication, trade to that area

jupiter_aspecting.on_planet: Blesses, purifies, expands the planet's positive expression
jupiter_aspecting.on_house: Greatly benefits the life area aspected
jupiter_aspecting.special_note: Jupiter's special 5th and 9th aspects are highly auspicious - 5th = creativity/children blessing, 9th = fortune/dharma blessing

venus_aspecting.on_planet: Beautifies, harmonizes, brings pleasure to that planet's domain
venus_aspecting.on_house: Brings romance, comforts, arts to that life area

saturn_aspecting.on_planet: Restricts, slows, matures that planet's expression
saturn_aspecting.on_house: Brings delays, responsibility, hard work, possibly suffering to that area
saturn_aspecting.special_note: Saturn's special 3rd and 10th aspects - 3rd = blocks courage/efforts, 10th = career delays

themes: adds obsession, foreign, illusion, sudden intensity
rahu_aspecting.on_planet: Magnifies and distorts that planet's themes
rahu_aspecting.on_house: Brings obsessive, foreign, or unconventional themes to that area

ketu_aspecting.on_planet: Detaches person from that planet's themes - makes it harder to enjoy
ketu_aspecting.on_house: Brings spiritual detachment or sudden losses to that area

predictions: mother may be distant or strict
father may be strict or distant
attraction to foreign or unusual partners
